name: CivicRadar — Mumbai, Pune & Thane Monsoon Hazards
description: Free community app for monsoon hazard reporting in Mumbai, Pune, and Thane. Report stagnant water, rally neighbours, track fixes. Independent student-built tool — not an official municipal app.
